sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22444" key="glwssopoii/+a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γλωσσο-ποιΐα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n22444.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">making of mouth-pieces</tr_> (<cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">γλῶσσα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0458.tlg001:111:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">111.1</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>), and <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γλωσσο-ποιός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">making them</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:108" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.108</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:153" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.153</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
